news.title:
Network18's board approves amalgamation of News18 Marathi, a wholly-owned subsidiary, effective April 1, 2026.
No cash or shares will be exchanged; shareholding remains unchanged. Merger awaits statutory and regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
Network18's board approves amalgamation of News18 Marathi, a wholly-owned subsidiary, effective April 1, 2026.
No cash or shares will be exchanged; shareholding remains unchanged. Merger awaits statutory and regulatory approvals.

news.title:
MC Explains details mutual fund taxation, covering STCG, LTCG, and dividends across equity, debt, and gold funds.
The episode highlights tax rates for various funds, dividend tax treatment, and their impact on investment returns.
news.summary:

Stock underperforms sector and indices due to financial concerns.

news.title:
West Asia tensions may disrupt LNG supplies, impacting LPG, CNG, and fertilizers.
Network18 Media highlights geopolitical risks affecting India's natural gas sector.

news.title:
Network18 Media repaid Rs. 250 crore for 5000 units of CP on Mar 11, 2026.
The full repayment cleared all outstanding CP obligations, leaving no dues.
news.summary:

All 4,000 units redeemed; outstanding amount stands at nil post repayment.

news.title:
Network 18 Media's revenue grew 5% YoY to Rs 500 cr despite weak ads.
TV viewership rose to 14.2%; renewed 10-year CNN partnership; profit hit by exceptions.
news.summary:

news.title:
Network 18 Media reported Q3 revenue of Rs. 1,360.5 Cr, with unaudited results approved.
Exceptional items and new Labour Codes led to Rs. 20.7 Cr additional obligation.
news.summary:
Network 18 Media reported Q3 revenue of Rs. 1,360.5 Cr, with unaudited results approved.

news.title:

Sales decline 60.4% to Rs 539.4 crore in the same period.

news.title:
Reliance Group's companies, including RIL, Jio Financial, and Network18, are pursuing aggressive expansions, targeting capacity scaling and new growth segments.
Jio Financial showed 12x AUM growth YoY; Network18 expanded regional presence; RIL progresses in solar, battery storage, and retail.
news.summary:
Reliance Group's companies, including RIL, Jio Financial, and Network18, are pursuing aggressive expansions, targeting capacity scaling and new growth segments.
Jio Financial showed 12x AUM growth YoY; Network18 expanded regional presence; RIL progresses in solar, battery storage, and retail.
